alt_text: A clean single-page diagram for the stark-review-plan skill showing a usage-focused flow from command invocation, setup, validation, and PR detection into a 21-agent review-fix loop, a dispatch-failure branch, a final review round, consolidated summary generation, and output artifacts like a .review.md file, PR comments, and saved history, with cards explaining arguments, common workflows, outputs, observability, and troubleshooting."}}
